title: PayPal's PYUSD Becomes #1 Stablecoin – Overtakes USDT in Daily Volume
shortdescription: PayPal's dollar stablecoin now used by 600 million users — Tether market share collapses.
description: Venmo integrates PYUSD payments — daily volume hits $18B, surpassing USDT for first time in history.
author: Gwen John

title: Treasury Liquidity Drain: $150 Billion in Settlements Could Pressure Stocks and Crypto
shortdescription: Up to $150B in Treasury settlements may drain market liquidity, raising risks for stocks, crypto, and global markets as dollar funding and yen volatility rise.
description: Liquidity tightening ahead: Treasury supply spike puts markets on watch as $150 billion in settlements could pressure stocks, crypto, and global risk assets.
author: Gwen John

title: Gallup Poll: U.S. Confidence in Markets Rebounds, Worries Over Prices and Employment Persist
shortdescription: Americans expect stock market and economic growth to improve in 2026, but most still worry about rising inflation, unemployment, and household costs, Gallup finds.
description: Americans grow more optimistic on stocks and growth but fear inflation and job losses — new poll shows a divided nation bracing for higher prices and employment shifts in 2026.
author: Macro Anton
